items.title: Fast iteration on a chat UI
items.scenario: You're building a chat interface and want instant feedback as you edit.
items.explanation: Vite's dev server with hot module replacement updates the browser in milliseconds without a full rebuild.

items.title: Shrinking a production build
items.scenario: Your eval dashboard imports a big library but uses only part of it.
items.explanation: Tree-shaking drops the unused exports and minification compresses the rest, so users download less.

items.title: Lazy-loading a heavy view
items.scenario: A rarely used analytics page pulls in charting code.
items.explanation: Code-splitting puts it in a separate chunk loaded only when that page is visited.

items.title: Running a TS agent script
items.scenario: You want to run an ingestion script written in TypeScript without a build step.
items.explanation: tsx executes the .ts file directly during development.
